dict.string: Hair Diagnostics reads your nutrition data (biotin, iron, zinc, vitamin D) to correlate supplement intake with hair health trends.
Hair Diagnostics saves your hair health assessments and supplement logs to the Health app so you can track everything in one place.
Hair Diagnostics uses the camera to photograph your hair and scalp for visual tracking over time.
Hair Diagnostics accesses your photo library to import hair photos for analysis.
